Appearances:
Attorney Paul Arshawsky appearing for the plaintiff, David Realty Co.
Defendant Donald F. Burton Jr. is present.
Attorney Aaron Morrison appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schrieber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAY-28-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
